title: Hosted Retrieval and Knowledge Access
objective: Operationalize current-authority, historical, contextual, structured, semantic, and projection access against the hosted governed state without leaking authority or converting projections into canonical truth.
exit_criteria: Hosted consumers can explicitly request current-authority, historical, and as-of views
Tenant, subject, domain, audience, purpose, privacy, and provenance filters are enforced server-side
Structured and semantic retrieval remain deterministic within declared contracts
Projections and interpretations remain noncanonical absent separate governed promotion
Pagination, stale-state, denial, replay, and leakage paths are validated
Model access continues through the governed provider-neutral model gateway

evidence.description: Hosted identity-gated retrieval service with tenant-scoped physical catalog, explicit current/historical/as-of access, deterministic pagination/search, privacy filtering, stable replay hashes, and provider-neutral model-gateway handoff.
Implemented and repaired hosted retrieval, historical as-of semantics, stable replay identity scope, and model-gateway context consistency.
Merged corrected Sprint 43 hosted retrieval implementation.
CI passed for the final corrected Sprint 43 head.
Runtime Coverage passed for the final corrected Sprint 43 head.
Work Control Authority passed for the final corrected Sprint 43 head.
